When the eclipsed Moon is cut by a meteor, the king, whose
natal star is occupied by the Moon at the time, will soon die.

If the Moon is of ash colour, rough, reddish, devoid of rays,
and of dark appearance, and looks broken or shaky, people will
have danger from hunger, tumult, pestilence, disease and thieves
in store.

The Moorfs Transit IV 41

Should the Moon appear white like snow, the Kunda (jas-
mine) flower, lotus and crystal, as if she were placed above by
Goddess ParvatT after polishing her carefully with the idea that
she might get happiness at night through her, she would bestow all
happiness and prosperity on the whole mankind.
